author: crishood
description: Convert a folder of PDFs into Markdown files with embedded PDFs

manifest.author: CrisHood
manifest.description: Convert a folder of PDFs into a folder of Markdown files with embedded PDFs. Ideal for users migrating PDF notes from apps like Boox or organizing reference materials inside Obsidian, ensuring a seamless workflow for note-taking and knowledge management.
manifest.name: PDF Folder to Markdowns

name: PDF Folder to Markdowns

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release notes

## ✨ Features

- **[ADDED]:** Introduced a settings toggle to enable or disable Obsidian attachment handling, allowing PDFs to be treated like any other attachment in the vault.

- **[ADDED]:** Added support for template automation after PDF-to-Markdown conversion. This enables wrapping PDFs in Markdown files so metadata can be applied using predefined templates with standard frontmatter properties.

- **[FIXED]:** Implemented a default language fallback.

- **[ADDED]:** Added support for the Korean language.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release notes

## ✨ Features

-   **[ADDED]:** Convert all PDFs in a selected folder into individual Markdown files.
-   **[ADDED]:** Optionally rename the input folder after conversion.
-   **[ADDED]:** Configurable suffix for renaming the input folder.
